technical_replicate: In total, 800 cells were seeded in 60 mm dishes in triplicate.
experimental_design: USP11 knockdown in U2OS and A549 cells
To gain insight into the functional relevance of SPRTN-USP11 interaction, we first examined whether USP11 functions in response to DNA damage caused by DPC-inducing agents.
factor_value: To gain insight into the functional relevance of SPRTN-USP11 interaction, we first examined whether USP11 functions in response to DNA damage caused by DPC-inducing agents.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
